name: B.A. Johnston's Ham Jam
overview: A comedy documentary series starring the cult Canadian trash troubadour B.A. Johnston. A community access television program on Fibe TV1, coming soon to YouTube, April 18th 2019.  Beloved folk-trash troubadour B.A. Johnston teaches viewers everything they never wanted to know about his hometown of Hamilton, Ontario. Obscure urban legends into a rambling tour to the heart of the under appreciated city.
